object_under_evaluation: provenance-preserving compost artifacts derived from witness-facing inputs
claim_boundary: This report speaks only to whether witness-derived compost artifacts preserved provenance and review posture on this bounded family.
limitations: It does not prove canon readiness.
It does not grade the philosophical truth of the resulting idea.

case_notes.source_ref_note: The note kept direct refs back to the upstream witness summary and named what changed in distillation.
case_notes.review_state_note: The artifact stayed explicitly provisional and kept current limits visible.
case_notes.promotion_boundary_note: The note stopped short of principle or canon language and kept contradiction posture open.

case_notes.source_ref_note: Source refs remained present, but one canon-leaning sentence looked cleaner than the evidence chain supported.
case_notes.review_state_note: Review posture stayed visible, yet the artifact's polished top line risked over-reading by a new reviewer.
case_notes.promotion_boundary_note: The promotion gate held, but the canon-pressure case still needs tighter boundary wording.
